inherited_exposed_result: 3bp two-event parent: base +69.06%, max drawdown -1.77%, only 5 episodes; holdouts unopened
question: Can a threshold-free two-positive-in/two-nonpositive-out funding-sign hysteresis rule produce sufficiently many profitable cash-and-carry episodes after basis and two-leg costs?
entry: flat; current and previous settled funding >0; choose highest current rate
exit: after counting the second consecutive settled funding <=0; sample-end forced exit
capital: two fully funded units, equal initial spot long and perpetual short
development_gate: complete alignment; base/stress >0; >=10 episodes and >=100 active; episode median >0; win rate >=50%; max drawdown >-10%
evaluation_gate: base/stress >0; >=5 episodes and >=50 active; episode median >=0; win rate >=50%; max drawdown >-10%
confirmation_gate: base/stress >0; >=10 episodes and >=100 active; both symbols selected; episode median >=0; win rate >=50%; max drawdown >-10%
holdout_release_rule: reuse exposed development only after checkpoint; evaluation then confirmation opened sequentially on pass
